plan.annotation: Validation occurs prior to the commit operation within the protocol layer.

operations.label: Define core components
operations.value: Client, Portable Protocol, Validation Engine, Adapter Boundary, Memory, Convex, Postgres

operations.label: Map protocol flow
operations.value: Client -> Protocol -> Validation -> Adapter Boundary -> Adapters

operations.label: Isolate persistence
operations.value: Boundary between Protocol/Validation and Backend Adapters

plan.pptxFallback: A series of grouped editable shapes and connectors representing the flow from Client to specific Backend Adapters, with a distinct visual boundary separating the protocol from the adapters.
plan.takeaway: The portable protocol enforces validation before commit, isolating backend-specific persistence behind an adapter boundary.
plan.title: NodeSlide Protocol & Adapter Architecture
